de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml

Class JmlTermFactory

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.JmlTermFactory

  • public final class JmlTermFactory
extends java.lang.Object
    Old legacy factory methods for constructing KeY terms for JML constructs.

      • upperBound

        public Term upperBound(Term a,
                       LogicVariable lv)
        Extracts upper bound from a if it matches the pattern.
        Parameters:
        a - guard to be disected
        lv - variable bound by quantifier
        Returns:
        upper bound term (or null)

      • createInv

        @Nonnull
public SLExpression createInv(Term selfVar,
                                       KeYJavaType targetType)
        Need to handle this one differently from INV_FOR since here also static invariants may occur. For a static invariant, take the passed type as receiver.

      • typerestrict

        @Nonnull
protected Term typerestrict(@Nonnull
                                     KeYJavaType kjt,
                                     boolean nullable,
                                     java.lang.Iterable<? extends QuantifiableVariable> qvs)
        Provide restriction terms for the declared KeYJavaType Note that these restrictions only apply to the JML to DL translation. See also TermBuilder.reachableValue(Term, KeYJavaType).
